test-case.name: CheckUnsupportedPartLoss_CascadesDependents

test-case.output: [Combat] test creature equips test armor.

failure.message: One or more child tests had errors
FrozenEffect.OnApply should extinguish any active BurningEffect Expected: False But was: True
Ice Lance's cooling heat should cross FreezeTemperature and apply FrozenEffect via TryFreeze Expected: True But was: False
Kindle should increase target temperature via ApplyHeat Expected: greater than 25.0f But was: 25.0f
Kindle heat should trigger ignition on low-FlameTemp combustible entity Expected: True But was: False
Kindle should emit radiant heat to entities adjacent to the target Expected: greater than 25.0f But was: 25.0f
Quench should cool the target via negative Joules Expected: less than 300.0f But was: 300.0f
Quench should cool target below flame temperature Expected: less than 200.0f But was: 400.0f
Expected: True But was: False
One or more child tests had errors
Expected: null But was: <Entity(wall)>
One or more child tests had errors
Barrel should eventually ignite from nearby burning torch Expected: True But was: False
Adjacent entity should be heated by burning neighbor Expected: greater than 25.0f But was: 24.3875008f
One or more child tests had errors
Expected: less than 100 But was: 100
Expected: less than 100 But was: 100
Poison should deal damage on turn start Expected: less than 100 But was: 100

test-case.name: OverworldZoneManager_CachesZones
